title: India Opts Out of Uganda Para Badminton International
indian_angle: BAI's decision affects Indian para-badminton players, indicating strategic choices for national participation.
summary: The Badminton Association of India announced that Indian players will not participate in the upcoming Uganda Para Badminton International 2026.

title: Tan Kim Her's Strategy for Hari-Arjun Pair

summary: Doubles coach Tan Kim Her explains his approach to forming the new Hariharan-Arjun pair, following the success of Satwik-Chirag.

title: Sindhu, Arjun-Hariharan Advance at Indonesia Open
